summary: Implement projectile movement that frees itself on collision
prompt: Write a CharacterBody2D script for a projectile. On `_ready()`, set the velocity to `Vector2.RIGHT.rotated(rotation) * speed`. In `_physics_process`, call `move_and_slide()`. After moving, check `get_slide_collision_count() > 0` — if so, queue_free() the projectile. Export a `speed: float` variable with default 400.0.
evaluation_notes: Must use get_slide_collision_count() not get_slide_collisions (Godot 3). velocity set in _ready using rotation. queue_free() after collision detection.
